mapper.sql: reservation_id AS reservationId, member_id AS memberId, place_id AS placeId, visitor_name AS visitorName, phone, visit_date AS visitDate, headcount, status, created_at AS createdAt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RESERVATION (member_id, place_id, visitor_name, phone, visit_date, headcount, status) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{placeId}, #{visitorName}, #{phone}, #{visitDate}, #{headcount}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM RESERVATION WHERE member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE RESERVATION SET status = '예약만료' WHERE status = '예약중' AND created_at < #{cutoff}
